scope_comment: Minimal mutation gate for the highest-stakes sync money logic:
src/normalize.ts only -- the durable investment classification
ONLY normalize.ts; the rest of src/ (handler/writer/holdings/client)
does DynamoDB + network IO and is integration-tested, not unit-mutated.
gated by that package's own stryker config, not here.
runner_comment: This workspace tests with Vitest (npm test = `vitest run`), so we use the
Stryker vitest runner -- it instruments and runs the TS tests through vite
directly, so unlike the node:test workspaces (packages/shared, app) there
is no tsc buildCommand or self-contained tsconfig.stryker.json to maintain.
thresholds_comment: Modest/achievable for a first run over a small (8-test) suite; raise by
strengthening tests, never lower to mask survivors.
